---
name: Feature request
about: New stack template, agent, command, or skill
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What are you adding?**
- [ ] Stack template
- [ ] Feature scaffold
- [ ] Agent
- [ ] Command
- [ ] Skill
- [ ] Other

**Stack / technology**
e.g. "Django + DRF + PostgreSQL"

**Why is this useful?**
Who would use this and in what situation?

**Have you tested it?**
Have you used this with Claude Code on a real project? What improved?

**Are you willing to submit a PR?**
- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No, just suggesting
